test-description: Verify that bookmarks appear at the standard(4) access points
Verify that bookmarks are properly added to bookmarks file and appear in all access points.
Add a new bookmark into a specific location within the bookmarks hierarchy.
Verify new bookmarks can be created (not added).
Verify that bookmarks are properly deleted from bookmarks file and disappear from all access points.
Verify that items from the personal toolbar folder are properly added/deleted.
Verify new folder creation and nesting of new folders.
Verify that double-clicking on a bookmark causes it to be launched in a browser window
Verify that there are no 'dead' default links.
Verify that changes to an item are saved without loss of item integrity.
Verify folder(s) are correctly deleted.
Verify that disclosure triangles/folder icons are in sync.
Verify separators are properly added/deleted.
Verify that changes are saved over restart/crash
Verify that view properties works as appropriate for bookmarks, folders, and separators(negative)
Change the name of a bookmark without use of the bookmark properties dialog.
surf using user-defined 'custom keyword'.
sort and reverse-sort per column
Verify that columns are resizable to show/hide more of entries
Show and hide columns.
Verify that several bookmarks are deleted at one time.
Verify that several bookmarks are deleted at one time.
